title: calcearia caudata
intro: Calcearia caudata, also known as Polypodium calcearia, is a type of fern native to the tropical regions of Asia. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calcearia caudata include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. Calcearia caudata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
